[2018-04-23 14:35] 1m2o: btw i need advice what's the most optimal line for vivid drone i always do some random line which i feel is good but i'm not sure anybody know it?
[2018-04-23 14:43] p0lari (Polari): if you're p2 and know you want 4 engis, 1EE DD1 very conveniently gives you 12 gold on turn 3 instead of 11 with DD DDEE
[2018-04-23 14:43] p0lari (Polari): other than that I don't think there's anything tricky you need to know
[2018-04-23 14:45] p0lari (Polari): just aim for having most of your drones as vivids (because they are more efficient) with enough regular drones left if you need them for plexos or lucy clicks or whatever
[2018-04-23 14:46] p0lari (Polari): or just holding unless you believe you'll manage to be careful enough about defence that you can live without the emergency option
[2018-04-23 14:46] jiecut: So I see p1 do 1ee too. Does it depend on how big of an econ size you want?
[2018-04-23 14:46] p0lari (Polari): for p1 I think there's some early vivid and engis line that ends up being marginally better if you immediately commit to really high econ
[2018-04-23 14:47] p0lari (Polari): I forget how that went, I always just do DD DDE as p1
[2018-04-23 14:48] p0lari (Polari): how does 1EE even play out as p1
[2018-04-23 14:49] p0lari (Polari): on turn 2 you have 7 gold so you need to do 11, float 3 and lose all your regular drones? then on turn 3 you'll have exact for DDDD
[2018-04-23 14:49] jiecut: I might've been mistaken. Let me look
[2018-04-23 14:49] p0lari (Polari): so at that point you have... 4 engis, 4 drones, 3 vivids, 0 floated gold for 13 total econ
[2018-04-23 14:49] p0lari (Polari): with DD DDE DDD you have 13 drones, 3 engis, 1 gold
[2018-04-23 14:50] p0lari (Polari): so with the 1ee line you're 1 gold down, 1 engi up, and have 3 less future vivid purchase options
[2018-04-23 14:51] p0lari (Polari): I guess that must have been the line I was thinking of as "marginally better if you immediately commit to really high econ"
[2018-04-23 14:52] jiecut: So with the line I think you got 4 drones on turn 3. I haven't analyzed it.
[2018-04-23 14:52] p0lari (Polari): yeah that's what I wrote above
[2018-04-23 14:52] p0lari (Polari): as p2 if you do the t1 double engi you get to buy 3 drones on t2, and on t3 the extra gold is critical for letting you either DDDD or DD1C instead of DD1 float 3
[2018-04-23 14:53] p0lari (Polari): as p1 you still only get two drones on t2 and don't end up that much better later
[2018-04-23 14:53] p0lari (Polari): (also note that 3.DD1C isn't an option for p1 because you have 0 drones on board there)
[2018-04-23 14:58] 1m2o: now i got like 3 games in a row with vivid ty for the info 😄

[2018-04-23 15:02] 1m2o: he is up to 5 and set up ampo
[2018-04-23 15:02] 1m2o: i don't have dmg :DansGame:
[2018-04-23 15:02] supergreyman (Greyman): Better brush up your set reading
[2018-04-23 15:02] 1m2o: Zemora > amporilla trust me
[2018-04-23 15:03] 1m2o: i don't have chance ;D
[2018-04-23 15:04] supergreyman (Greyman): Just use your knowledge of vivid drone and gain 2 times longer win streak.
[2018-04-23 15:04] 1m2o: i should've used double redemer but i forge they were in the set
[2018-04-23 15:04] 1m2o: i still could've won LUL
[2018-04-23 15:04] 1m2o: at least i got knowledge on vivid while playing
[2018-04-23 15:06] 1m2o: rip i lost 4 amporilas too much

[2018-04-23 15:14] mtanzer: p1 plays 1EE  11  DDDD and p2 plays 1EE  1DD  DDDD
[2018-04-23 15:16] mtanzer: for p1 if you play DD DDE DDD instead you're missing out on having a 1 gold engineer compared to the other line, which pays for itself the next turn when you buy another vivid usually

[2018-04-23 19:03] person11: Does anyone know the equivalent strength of a 7 sec Masterbot in terms of Ranked? Like would it be Teir I, II, etc?
[2018-04-23 19:08] mrguy888: We don't know. It wouldn't make tier x though
[2018-04-23 19:09] mrguy888: There were some ratings given by elyot but they have problems so it is impossible to know what they mean compared to ranked.
[2018-04-23 19:09] supergreyman (Greyman): In casual game, 2016MasterBot is around 1570 according to wiki. But usually, the stronger players don't really play at casual game, so the number for ranked game would be lower than that.
[2018-04-23 19:09] liadahlia (Lia): what if we put master bot on the ladder and see how far it gets
[2018-04-23 19:10] mrguy888: we could do that pretty easily
[2018-04-23 19:10] mrguy888: maybe i should actually 🤔
[2018-04-23 19:10] liadahlia (Lia): can't be as bad as blindfold prismata
[2018-04-23 19:10] Deleted User (Deleted User): you just said it was pretty easy 🤔
[2018-04-23 19:10] mrguy888: it would be much worse
[2018-04-23 19:11] mrguy888: easy in terms of mental effort
[2018-04-23 19:11] mrguy888: you just make the set and play masterbot
[2018-04-23 19:11] liadahlia (Lia): get an alt, run two instances of mata, queue up on your alt, play master bot with the same set
[2018-04-23 19:11] steel0229e (Steel): master bot was allowed to ladder some years ago (I can't say it for sure but I think the average strength of players at those low ranks was higher on average then) and it scored tier 6
[2018-04-23 19:11] mrguy888: different masterbot different rating system different era
[2018-04-23 19:13] supergreyman (Greyman): I think it would be able to reach Master Tier with rating 1500, assuming it pass the Turing Test.
[2018-04-23 19:13] steel0229e (Steel): I assume it would not reach master tier, certainly not 1500 which seems too inflated by feeding
[2018-04-23 19:13] mrguy888: 1500 doesnt reach master tier and i dont think master bot is 1500
[2018-04-23 19:15] liadahlia (Lia): why does it need to pass the turing test 🤔
[2018-04-23 19:16] supergreyman (Greyman): People would play differently if they realize it's a bot.
[2018-04-23 19:16] Deleted User (Deleted User): wait how good is 1EE for p1
[2018-04-23 19:18] liadahlia (Lia): some people plays a lot like master bot
[2018-04-23 19:18] mrguy888: im not sure how true that is outside of people playing worse because they are so much better than the bot
[2018-04-23 19:18] liadahlia (Lia): i wouldn't worry about it
[2018-04-23 19:18] mrguy888: but they win either way so it doesnt matter
